● Last Week Summarised
A softer week on volume.
Purchases down 21%, revenue down 12%.

Mon 20 Apr – Sun 26 Apr 2026 vs Mon 13 Apr – Sun 19 Apr 2026.

Spend increased modestly — +12% week-on-week — but purchase volume pulled back sharply, down 21% to 386 conversions. Revenue followed, declining 12% to €27,071. ROAS compressed to 3.82x from 4.84x the prior week, and CPP widened to €18.36 vs €13.01 — suggesting the incremental spend this week found less efficient inventory. Worth monitoring closely heading into the next week.

💰 €27,071 revenue ↓−11.6%
🛒 386 purchases ↓−20.6%
🎯 3.82x ROAS ↓−21.1% vs 4.84x
💸 €18.36 CPP ↑+41.1% vs €13.01
📈 €7,086 spend ↑+12.0%
